messages.content: Always use code blocks with the appropriate language tags. If asked for a table always format it using Markdown syntax.
مراكز اعادة التاهيل والعلاج الطبيعي والمستشفيات بالانجليبزية

I can provide you with translation for "Rehabilitation Centers", "Physical Therapy Centers", and "Hospitals" in English.

```plaintext
Rehabilitation Centers
Physical Therapy Centers
Hospitals
```
In English, "مركز تدريب وتأهيل ذوي الاحتياجات" translates to "Center for Training and Rehabilitation for People with Special Needs".
